calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Atty. Connie Chan, Esquire appeared for the Petitioner Rui Chan Ma present, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: SUSIE SZETO.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Reset To Aug-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
RUI CHAN MA- APPEARED IN PROPER
PAN SYZETO- CHINESE INTERPRETER FOR PETITIONER
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Petitioner: Rui Chan Ma, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.

Court continued matter to August 22, 2006 for the petitioner's attorney to be present in court or file a substitution of attorney to act as proper or in her own behalf.
